_comment: WC2026 Group H, MD3. Standings before: Spain 4, Uruguay 2, Cape Verde 2 (0-0 Spain, 2-2 Uruguay), Saudi 1 (1-1 Uruguay, 0-4 Spain). BOTH need to win to qualify (Cape Verde for 2nd/best-third, Saudi for a slim chance) -> structural must-win for both -> open game. Cape Verde the slightly better side: organized AND can score (held Spain to 0-0, scored 2 vs Uruguay); Saudi weak (0-4 Spain) but drew Uruguay. Near-even, Cape Verde a small edge. Home = Cape Verde, away = Saudi Arabia. Cards not modelled (referee TBD).

meta.stakes: Both need a win to qualify (Cape Verde for 2nd / best-third, Saudi for a slim chance). Crucial; open, both-go-for-it game. Cape Verde a slight favourite.

home.name: Cape Verde
notes: Organized debutant that also scores: 0-0 Spain, 2-2 Uruguay. attack 1.10, context 1.05 (must-win).
Slight edge and motivated -> open game.

away.name: Saudi Arabia
notes: Weak vs quality (0-4 Spain) but drew Uruguay. attack 0.95, context 1.05 (must-win too).
Also needs the win -> both attack.
